grant_title: Newark UEZ Citywide Façade Improvement Program
project_area: Exterior storefront upgrades, including painting, signage, lighting, windows, doors, awnings, ADA accessibility, and full renovations
demographic_requirements: None specified; open to all eligible businesses within the Newark UEZ corridors
eligibility_summary: Certified businesses within the Newark Urban Enterprise Zone (UEZ) corridors are eligible. Applicants must provide current UEZ certification, detailed project plans, cost estimates, permits, and proof of tax compliance. Funding is available for exterior improvements to enhance visibility, accessibility, and community appeal.
